selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw: {"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the tactics used by fake accounts and to use tools provided by social media platforms to identify and report suspicious activity. Additionally, users should exercise critical thinking when consuming information online and verify the credibility of sources before sharing or using them. Furthermore, social media companies must take responsibility for monitoring their platforms and removing fake content to maintain a safe and trustworthy environment. By working together, we can reduce the spread of misinformation and promote a more informed public discourse.","reasoning_summary":"To manage and deal with fake content on social media, users should be aware of tactics used by fake accounts, use tools provided by platforms, exercise critical thinking when consuming information online, verify credibility of sources before sharing or using them, and work together to promote a more informed public discourse.","tone":"informative","citations":["<source name or org>"]}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be aware of the tactics used by fake accounts and to use tools provided by social media platforms to identify and report suspicious activity. Additionally, users should exercise critical thinking when consuming information online and verify the credibility of sources before sharing or using them. Furthermore, social media companies must take responsibility for monitoring their platforms and removing fake content to maintain a safe and trustworthy environment. By working together, we can reduce the spread of misinformation and promote a more informed public discourse.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, users should be aware of tactics used by fake accounts, use tools provided by platforms, exercise critical thinking when consuming information online, verify credibility of sources before sharing or using them, and work together to promote a more informed public discourse.
